title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud presented new Looker capabilities including dashboard agents that automate workflows, conversational analytics, and semantic model enhancements integrated with Gemini. The platform emphasizes grounding AI in a governed semantic layer to enable business users in an agentic era.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through new Looker features built for an agentic, governed analytics workflow: dashboard agents that automate tasks, conversational analytics, and semantic model enhancements tied to Gemini. The throughline is grounding AI in a governed semantic layer so that business users, not just analysts, can act on data. Key takeaways: the semantic layer serves as the source of truth that constrains and grounds AI responses, and Gemini integration extends across dashboards, conversation, and modeling rather than sitting in a single feature.
